scripts.dev: concurrently -n bot,web -c blue,green "npm run bot:dev" "npm run dashboard:dev"
scripts.build: npm run bot:build && npm run dashboard:build
scripts.start: concurrently -n bot,web -c blue,green "npm run bot:start" "npm run dashboard:start"
scripts.postinstall: cd bot && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install
